title: T-103 — wire @monopilot/ops TS path alias in apps/web/tsconfig.json (FT-043)
prompt:
# T-103 — wire @monopilot/ops TS path alias in apps/web/tsconfig.json (FT-043)

PRD: `docs/prd/00-FOUNDATION-PRD.md` — sections: §5
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`
Original carry-forward ID: **FT-043** (from `_meta/audits/2026-05-07-foundation-final-carry-forward-backlog.md`)
Severity: **P2** (XS effort)

## Goal
apps/web/tsconfig.json includes @monopilot/ops path alias; cron route imports via the alias.

## Implementation contract
1. tsconfig.json compilerOptions.paths: `'@monopilot/ops': ['../../packages/ops/src']`.
2. cron route: `import {...} from '@monopilot/ops'`.
3. Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web typecheck`.

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/tsconfig.json [modify]
- apps/web/app/api/cron/[name]/route.ts [modify]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the change, when `pnpm typecheck` runs in apps/web, then no path-resolution errors.
2. Given the cron route, when scanned, then it imports from `@monopilot/ops` (no relative path).

## Test strategy
- RED: not applicable (config + import change).
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web typecheck`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not break other path aliases.

## Closeout evidence
Provide: changed_files, test_commands_and_results, acceptance_criteria_status (per AC), deviations_from_prd, git_status. Use the test-driven-development skill (RED-first) and requesting-code-review at GREEN.

pipeline_inputs.description: Add @monopilot/ops TS path alias to apps/web tsconfig and replace the relative cron import.
pipeline_inputs.details: T-034 currently imports the ops package via a brittle relative path. Add the alias mapping and update the import.
out_of_scope: Do not refactor ops package internals.
acceptance_criteria: Given the change, when `pnpm typecheck` runs in apps/web, then no path-resolution errors.
Given the cron route, when scanned, then it imports from `@monopilot/ops` (no relative path).
risk_red_lines: Do not break other path aliases.
Do not silently break IDE path resolution — verify `pnpm -w tsc --noEmit` passes after the alias change
